info.title: WAX API - Payment
info.description: Endpoints for payment management: creating or updating a Stripe PaymentIntent for the active basket, and handling Stripe webhook events.

tags.name: Payment
tags.description: Payment operations: PaymentIntent creation/update and Stripe webhook processing

post.description:
Creates a new Stripe PaymentIntent for the current basket, or updates the existing one if the basket already has a PaymentIntent associated. The basket is identified via a cookie set by the server. Returns the updated basket including the `clientSecret` needed by the frontend to confirm the payment with Stripe.js.

**Requires authentication.**

200.description: PaymentIntent created or updated successfully. Returns the basket with the Stripe `clientSecret` and `paymentIntentId` populated.

400.description: Bad request. Possible causes: basket not found, basket is empty, or Stripe API error.

post.description:
Receives and processes Stripe webhook events (e.g., `payment_intent.succeeded`, `payment_intent.payment_failed`). The raw request body is used to verify the Stripe signature provided in the `Stripe-Signature` header.

**This endpoint is called exclusively by Stripe — it should NOT be called directly by the frontend.**

On `payment_intent.succeeded`, the associated order is marked as paid. On `payment_intent.payment_failed`, the order payment status is updated accordingly.

parameters.name: Stripe-Signature
parameters.description: Stripe webhook signature used to verify the authenticity of the event. Provided automatically by Stripe in every webhook request.

requestBody.description: Raw JSON payload sent by Stripe. Must be read as a raw string (do not parse before signature verification).

400.description: Bad request. Possible causes: invalid or missing Stripe signature, unrecognized event type, or processing error.

BasketDto.description: Shopping basket representation, including Stripe PaymentIntent details when a payment intent has been created.

basketId.description: Unique identifier of the basket (stored in a cookie on the client side)

items.description: List of items in the basket

clientSecret.description: Stripe PaymentIntent client secret. Use this value with Stripe.js (`stripe.confirmPayment`) on the frontend to complete the payment. Only present after calling `POST /api/Payment`.

paymentIntentId.description: Stripe PaymentIntent ID associated with this basket. Used internally to update an existing intent instead of creating a new one.

BasketItemDto.description: A single item within the shopping basket

price.description: Unit price of the product in cents (e.g., 120000 = $1,200.00)

quantity.description: Number of units of this product in the basket

ErrorResponse.description: Generic error response returned when a request fails

error.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong

cookieAuth.name: .AspNetCore.Identity.Application
cookieAuth.description: ASP.NET Identity authentication cookie. Obtained via POST /api/login?useCookies=true.
